member.name: T:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader
member.summary: Implements an that can read primitive data types from a -based .

member.name: P:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.Offset
member.summary: Gets the offset into the underlying to start reading from.

member.name: P:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.Length
member.summary: Gets the effective length of the readable region of the underlying .

member.name: P:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the current reading position within the underlying .

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.#ctor(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte}@)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of based on the specified .
member.param: The input .

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.ReadBoolean
member.summary: Reads a boolean value from the underlying and advances the current position by one byte.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.ReadByte
member.summary: Reads the next byte from the underlying and advances the current position by one byte.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.ReadBytes(System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads the specified number of bytes from the underlying into a new byte array and advances the current position by that number of bytes.
member.param: The number of bytes to read.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.ReadDecimal
member.summary: Reads a decimal value from the underlying and advances the current position by sixteen bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.ReadDouble
member.summary: Reads a double-precision floating-point number from the underlying and advances the current position by eight bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.ReadInt16
member.summary: Reads a 16-bit signed integer from the underlying and advances the current position by two bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.ReadInt32
member.summary: Reads a 32-bit signed integer from the underlying and advances the current position by four bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.ReadInt64
member.summary: Reads a 64-bit signed integer signed integer from the underlying and advances the current position by eight bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.ReadSByte
member.summary: Reads a signed byte from the underlying and advances the current position by one byte.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.ReadSingle
member.summary: Reads a single-precision floating-point number from the underlying and advances the current position by four bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.ReadSpan(System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a span of bytes from the underlying and advances the current position by the number of bytes read.
member.param: The number of bytes to read.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.ReadUInt16
member.summary: Reads a 16-bit unsigned integer from the underlying and advances the current position by two bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.ReadUInt32
member.summary: Reads a 32-bit unsigned integer from the underlying and advances the current position by four bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.ReadUInt64
member.summary: Reads a 64-bit unsigned integer from the underlying and advances the current position by eight bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.InternalReadByte
member.summary: Reads the next byte from the underlying and advances the current position by one byte.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferMemoryReader.InternalReadSpan(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a read-only span over the specified number of bytes from the underlying and advances the current position by that number of bytes.
member.param: The size of the read-only span to return.

member.name: T:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader
member.summary: Implements an that can read primitive data types from a byte array.

member.name: P:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.Offset
member.summary: Gets the offset into the underlying byte array to start reading from.

member.name: P:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.Length
member.summary: Gets the effective length of the readable region of the underlying byte array.

member.name: P:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the current reading position within the underlying byte array.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.#ctor(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class based on the specified byte array.
member.param: The byte array to read from.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Initializes a new instance of the class based on the specified byte array.
A provided offset and length specifies the boundaries to use for reading.
member.param: The byte array to read from.

The 0-based offset into the byte array at which to begin reading from.
Cannot exceed the bounds of the byte array.

The maximum number of bytes that the reader will use for reading, relative to the offset position.
Cannot exceed the bounds of the byte array.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.#ctor(System.ArraySegment{System.Byte}@)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class based on the specified byte array segment.
member.param: The byte array segment to read from.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.ReadBoolean
member.summary: Reads a boolean value from the underlying byte array and advances the current position by one byte.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.ReadByte
member.summary: Reads the next byte from the underlying byte array and advances the current position by one byte.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.ReadBytes(System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads the specified number of bytes from the underlying byte array into a new byte array and advances the current position by that number of bytes.
member.param: The number of bytes to read.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.ReadDecimal
member.summary: Reads a decimal value from the underlying byte array and advances the current position by sixteen bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.ReadDouble
member.summary: Reads a double-precision floating-point number from the underlying byte array and advances the current position by eight bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.ReadInt16
member.summary: Reads a 16-bit signed integer from the underlying byte array and advances the current position by two bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.ReadInt32
member.summary: Reads a 32-bit signed integer from the underlying byte array and advances the current position by four bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.ReadInt64
member.summary: Reads a 64-bit signed integer from the underlying byte array and advances the current position by eight bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.ReadSByte
member.summary: Reads a signed byte from the underlying byte array and advances the current position by one byte.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.ReadSingle
member.summary: Reads a single-precision floating-point number from the underlying byte array and advances the current position by four bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.ReadSpan(System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a span of bytes from the underlying byte array and advances the current position by the number of bytes read.
member.param: The number of bytes to read.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.ReadUInt16
member.summary: Reads a 16-bit unsigned integer from the underlying byte array and advances the current position by two bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.ReadUInt32
member.summary: Reads a 32-bit unsigned integer from the underlying byte array and advances the current position by four bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.ReadUInt64
member.summary: Reads a 64-bit unsigned integer from the underlying byte array and advances the current position by eight bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.InternalReadByte
member.summary: Reads the next byte from the underlying byte array and advances the current position by one byte.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferReader.InternalReadSpan(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a read-only span over the specified number of bytes from the underlying byte array and advances the current position by that number of bytes.
member.param: The size of the read-only span to return.

member.name: T:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter
member.summary: Provides a writer for writing primitive data types to a byte array.

member.name: P:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Offset
member.summary: Gets the offset into the underlying byte array to start writing from.

member.name: P:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Length
member.summary: Gets the effective length of the writable region of the underlying byte array.

member.name: P:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the current writing position within the underlying byte array.

member.name: P:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.WrittenLength
member.summary: Gets the total number of bytes written to the underlying byte array.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.#ctor(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class using the specified byte array to write the output to.
member.param: The byte array to write to.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Initializes a new instance of the class using the specified byte array to write the output to.
A provided offset and length specifies the boundaries to use for writing.
member.param: The output buffer to write to.

The 0-based offset into the byte array at which to begin writing from.
Cannot exceed the bounds of the byte array.

The maximum number of bytes that the writer will use for writing, relative to the offset position.
Cannot exceed the bounds of the byte array.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Write(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Writes a boolean value to the underlying byte array and advances the current position by one byte.
member.param: The boolean value to write.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Write(System.Byte)
member.summary: Writes a byte to the underlying byte array and advances the current position by one byte.
member.param: The byte value to write.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Write(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Copies the contents of a byte array to the underlying byte array of the writer and advances the current position by the number of bytes written.
member.param: The buffer to copy data from.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Write(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Copies a region of a byte array to the underlying byte array of the writer and advances the current position by the number of bytes written.
member.param: The buffer to copy data from.
The 0-based offset in buffer at which to start copying from.
The number of bytes to copy.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Write(System.Decimal)
member.summary: Writes a decimal value to the underlying byte array and advances the current position by sixteen bytes.
member.param: The decimal value to write.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Write(System.Double)
member.summary: Writes a double-precision floating-point number to the underlying byte array and advances the current position by eight bytes.
member.param: The double-precision floating-point number to write.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Write(System.Int16)
member.summary: Writes a 16-bit signed integer to the underlying byte array and advances the current position by two bytes.
member.param: The 16-bit signed integer to write.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Write(System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes a 32-bit signed integer to the underlying byte array and advances the current position by four bytes.
member.param: The 32-bit signed integer to write.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Write(System.Int64)
member.summary: Writes a 64-bit signed integer to the underlying byte array and advances the current position by eight bytes.
member.param: The 64-bit signed integer to write.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Write(System.SByte)
member.summary: Writes a signed byte to the underlying byte array and advances the current position by one byte.
member.param: The signed byte value to write.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Write(System.Single)
member.summary: Writes a single-precision floating-point number to the underlying byte array and advances the current position by one byte.
member.param: The single-precision floating-point number to write.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Write(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte}@)
member.summary: Copies a span of bytes to the underlying byte array and advances the current position by the number of bytes written.
member.param: The span of bytes to write.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Write(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Writes a 16-bit unsigned integer to the underlying byte array and advances the current position by two bytes.
member.param: The 16-bit unsigned integer to write.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Write(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Writes a 32-bit unsigned integer to the underlying byte array and advances the current position by four bytes.
member.param: The 32-bit unsigned integer to write.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.Write(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Writes a 64-bit unsigned integer value to the underlying byte array and advances the current position by eight bytes.
member.param: The 64-bit unsigned integer to write.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.ToReadOnlySpan
member.summary: Creates a span over the underlying byte array of the writer.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.BinaryBufferWriter.ToArray
member.summary: Returns the underlying byte array of the writer.

member.name: T:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader
member.summary: Represents a reader that can read primitive data types from a binary data source.

member.name: P:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader.Offset
member.summary: Gets the offset into the stream to start reading from.

member.name: P:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader.Length
member.summary: Gets the effective length of the readable region of the stream.

member.name: P:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the current reading position within the stream.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader.ReadBoolean
member.summary: Reads a boolean value from the current binary stream and advances the current position within the stream by one byte.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader.ReadByte
member.summary: Reads the next byte from the current binary stream and advances the current position within the stream by one byte.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader.ReadBytes(System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads the specified number of bytes from the current binary stream into a byte array and advances the current position within the stream by that number of bytes.
member.param: The number of bytes to read.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader.ReadDecimal
member.summary: Reads a decimal value from the current binary stream and advances the current position within the stream by sixteen bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader.ReadDouble
member.summary: Reads a double-precision floating-point number from the current binary stream and advances the current position within the stream by eight bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader.ReadInt16
member.summary: Reads a 16-bit signed integer from the current binary stream and advances the current position within the stream by two bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader.ReadInt32
member.summary: Reads a 32-bit signed integer from the current binary stream and advances the current position within the stream by four bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader.ReadInt64
member.summary: Reads a 63-bit signed integer from the current binary stream and advances the current position within the stream by eight bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader.ReadSByte
member.summary: Reads a signed byte from the current binary stream and advances the current position within the stream by one byte.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader.ReadSingle
member.summary: Reads single-precision floating-point number from the current binary stream and advances the current position within the stream by four bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader.ReadSpan(System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a span of bytes from the current binary stream and advances the current position within the stream by the number of bytes read.
member.param: The number of bytes to read.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader.ReadUInt16
member.summary: Reads a 16-bit unsigned integer from the current binary stream and advances the current position within the stream by two bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader.ReadUInt32
member.summary: Reads a 32-bit unsigned integer from the current binary stream and advances the current position within the stream by four bytes.

member.name: M:BinaryBuffers.IBufferReader.ReadUInt64
member.summary: Reads 64-bit unsigned integer from the current binary stream and advances the current position within the stream by eight bytes.
